titleStmt.title: SII 38.213: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 213. (A.R. No. 213 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: It records that five persons Siyaneri Aṉṉaparipālar, Tiruvēgambam-uḍaiyār, Aḻagiyavaradar, Arasar and Tirukaraivēl aḻagiya Paḍampakka-nāyakar, entered into a sale agreement with the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyar nāyaṉār (situated) in Puḻalkōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division of) Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. Accordingly they sold their kāṇi of two karai of land, as tirunāmattukkāṇi with all its appurtenances, out of twelve karai of land (situated) at Nāyappākkam alias Pāḍiāḍumperumāḷnallūr at Āṟṟūr-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam, for 200 vāśipaḍādanaṟpaṇam. The inscription also refers to an earlier grant of seven and half karai of land to the same temple as tirunāmattukkāṇi for conducting services and also for providing food offerings to the same god on various occasions.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cāyaṇauṭaiyārkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu Āṉa vicaiya samvatsaram dhanuśśu nāyaṟṟu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻalkoṭṭamāṉa vikkirama
macoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruoṟṟivūruṭaiyanāyaṉār Āti taṇṭecuratevarkku Immaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu puḻalnāṭṭu puḻal Āṉa Irācacuntarinallūr ceyane
ṟi Aṉṉaparipālar tiruvekampamuṭaiyār nārāyaṇatevarum meṟpaṭi Aṉṉaparipālan tiruvekampamuṭaiyārum Aḻakiyavaratarum Aracarum tirukaraivel A
ḻakiyār paṭampakka nāyakarum Ivvaṉaivarom kāṇi vilaippirāmāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ikkoṭṭattu Āṟṟūrnāṭṭu nāyappākkam Āṉa pāṭiāṭumpe
rumāḷnallūr niṉṟāṉ karai paṉṉiraṇṭu Itil muṉṉāḷ Iṉṉāyaṉārkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiāka pukaḻneṟi Aṅkarāyar nāyakappiḷḷai pakkal koṇṭa karai Araiyum ceyneṟi
Āṇṭapiḷḷaiyār tevāram Aḻakiyārum marutuvitta viṉāyakarum kaḷiyāṉaiyārum Immuvarum Inta nāyaṉār tiruppaṅkuṉi Uttirat tirunāḷ mu
talāṉa tirunāṭkaḷil tiruveḻucciyiṉ maṟṟaināḷ mutaliyār pāṭi Āṭuvār cuttara Apiḻcekam Āṭiaruḷi Amutu ceyyum tevāram Aḻakiyāṉ
tiruppavaṉi Eṉṟu periya tirumāḷikaiyil tiruvulācceytaruḷavum veṇṭum kuṟaivaṟuppukkum tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka viṭṭa karai Āṟum meṟpaṭi Aṉṉaparipālaṉa
tiruvekampamuṭaiyār Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal koṇṭa karai Araiyum meṟpaṭi vaḷḷalāḻvāṉ pakkal koṇṭa karai Araiyum Ākat tirunāmattukkāṇi
Āṉa karai Eḻaraiyum nikki niṉṟa karai nālaraiyil Eṅkaḷ kāṇi Āṉa karai Iraṇṭukkum Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṭakkum vācipaṭātanaṟ
ø2 100 Ippaṇam Irunūṟṟukkum Intakkarai Iraṇṭum Intakkarai nokkivarum cakalapparāttikaḷum tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka viṟṟuc cilā
lekai paṇṇik kuṭuttom .
Digital edition of SII 38.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
